discoveries.title: Hidimba Devi Temple
discoveries.body: A temple to visit in Manali, part of a travel guide that includes where to go, eat, stay, and shop.

discoveries.title: Old Manali
discoveries.body: A hippie town in Himachal, with a more laid-back atmosphere than New Manali. Best for: those looking for a relaxed atmosphere.

discoveries.title: Solang valley
discoveries.body: A valley near Manali with nearby Atal tunnel, accessible within 5-30 minutes

discoveries.title: Solang Valley
discoveries.body: A popular destination for adventure sports, part of a road trip itinerary from Delhi to Manali. Best for: adventure seekers.

discoveries.title: Beas River
discoveries.body: A river where you can engage in thrilling water sports, such as river rafting. Best for: adventure seekers.

discoveries.title: Bhrigu Lake
discoveries.body: A lake to visit in Manali, part of a travel guide that includes where to go, eat, stay, and shop.

discoveries.title: Indian tourist places
discoveries.body: Tip: Entry to Indian tourist places has different prices for Indians and foreigners. For example, the entrance to the Taj Mahal costs 1100 rupees for foreigners, while locals pay only 50 rupees.

discoveries.title: Surrendering Indian passport at RPO Chandigarh
discoveries.body: Tip: Surrendering an Indian passport at RPO Chandigarh can be done on a walk-in basis, except on Wednesdays. The process takes around 4 hours, including a lunch break from 1-2 pm, and requires filling out the surrender form online and paying a ₹500 fee.

discoveries.title: Monsoon in India
discoveries.body: Warning: The monsoon season in India has arrived, with the earliest onset over the Indian mainland since 2009.

days.description: Arrive in Manali and get accustomed to the surroundings, visit the famous Hidimba Devi Temple and explore the town.
